root.sql:
select FP_GET_GROUP_CONTROL(sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no) as GROUP_CONTROL ,sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( trim(FP_GET_GROUP_CONTROL(sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no)) ) as group_conname ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no ) as group_name
,(SELECT sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name FROM sc_dep_m_rule WHERE sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type AND ROWNUM = 1) AS deposit_name
,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type ,sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as data_balance from sc_cls_confirm_data ,sc_cls_confirm_mem where sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group in 'DEP'
/*WHERE*/
group by FP_GET_GROUP_CONTROL(sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no) ,sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( trim(FP_GET_GROUP_CONTROL(sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no)) ) ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group -- ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type -- ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance ORDER BY sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type

r_tnma_count_dep_export_nestdep.sql:
select (SELECT sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name FROM sc_dep_m_rule WHERE sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type AND ROWNUM = 1) AS deposit_name
,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type ,sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as data_balance from sc_cls_confirm_data ,sc_cls_confirm_mem where sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group in 'DEP'
/*WHERE*/
group by sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type ORDER BY sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type
